## [00:00 - 00:59]

Hey, my name is Koalajan S. I want to welcome you to the Upwork Prospecting section of this incubator. So first off, if you're not familiar with what Upwork is, it's simply a platform that connects business owners who are looking for freelancers to fulfill specific services. So to put that into perspective, if you're a gym owner and you want a freelancer who knows Facebook ads to run your Facebook ad campaigns, you're able to post a gig on Upwork. You're able to post a job looking for, obviously you're looking for a Facebook ads professional freelancer to fulfill that position. And then freelancers can actually apply to that gig. You can communicate with them through the platform as well as pay those freelancers through that platform. So it's a bit protected. It's a bit safer because it's all ran through the platform. So if you're a freelancer, you're able to find business owners who are looking for what you do. So that's what Upwork is. That's the simple breakdown of how it works.
